mapper.select:
SELECT O.OUTBOUND_ID AS outboundId, O.OUTBOUND_NO AS outboundNo, O.OUTBOUND_TYPE AS outboundType, O.OUTBOUND_DATE AS outboundDate, O.STATUS AS status, O.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, U.NAME AS createdUserName FROM OUTBOUNDS O LEFT JOIN CUSTOMERS C ON O.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON O.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON O.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND O.OUTBOUND_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{outboundNo}, '%')
AND O.OUTBOUND_TYPE = #{outboundType}
AND O.STATUS = #{status}
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND W.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
ORDER BY O.OUTBOUND_ID DESC

SELECT O.OUTBOUND_ID AS outboundId, O.OUTBOUND_NO AS outboundNo, O.OUTBOUND_TYPE AS outboundType, O.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, O.OUTBOUND_DATE AS outboundDate, O.STATUS AS status, O.REMARK AS remark, O.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, O.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, O.WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, U.NAME AS createdUserName FROM OUTBOUNDS O LEFT JOIN CUSTOMERS C ON O.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON O.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID JOIN USERS U ON O.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE O.OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId}

SELECT D.OUTBOUND_DETAIL_ID AS outboundDetailId, D.OUTBOUND_ID AS outboundId, D.ITEM_ID AS itemId, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, I.SPEC AS spec, I.UNIT AS unit, D.QUANTITY AS quantity, D.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, D.TOTAL_PRICE AS totalPrice, D.REMARK AS remark FROM OUTBOUND_DETAILS D JOIN ITEMS I ON D.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE D.OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} ORDER BY D.OUTBOUND_DETAIL_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE OUTBOUNDS SET STATUS = 'COMPLETED' WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} AND STATUS = 'DRAFT'

UPDATE OUTBOUNDS SET OUTBOUND_TYPE = #{outboundType}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}, WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}, OUTBOUND_DATE = #{outboundDate}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} AND STATUS = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE OUTBOUNDS SET STATUS = 'CANCELED' WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} AND STATUS = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE OUTBOUNDS SET STATUS = 'CANCELED' WHERE OUTBOUND_ID = #{outboundId} AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
